Table.Name: Command
Table.Command: SELECT T0."ContractID", T0."CstmrCode" AS "CardCode", T0."CstmrName" AS "CardName", T1."Name" AS "ContactPerson", T2.U_NAME AS "Owner", T0."Status", T0."CntrcType" AS "ServiceType", T0."ResponseV" AS "ResponseTime", T0."ResponseU" AS "ResponseTimeUnit", T0."ResponsVal" AS "ResolutionTime", T0."ResponsUnt" AS "ResolutionTimeUnit", T0."Renewal", T0."StartDate", T0."EndDate", T0."TermDate" AS "TerminationDate", T0."Descriptio" AS "Description", T0."MonEnabled", T0."TueEnabled", T0."WedEnabled", T0."ThuEnabled", T0."FriEnabled", T0."SatEnabled", T0."SunEnabled", T0."MonStart", T0."MonEnd", T0."TueStart", T0."TueEnd", T0."WedStart", T0."WedEnd", T0."ThuStart", T0."ThuEnd", T0."FriStart", T0."FriEnd", T0."SatStart", T0."SatEnd", T0."SunStrart" AS "SunStart", T0."SunEnd", T0."InclHldays", T0."InclParts", T0."InclWork", T0."InclTravel", T0."Remarks2" FROM OCTR T0 LEFT OUTER JOIN OCPR T1 ON T0."CntctCode" = T1."CntctCode" LEFT OUTER JOIN OUSR T2 ON T0."Owner" = T2.INTERNAL_K WHERE T0."ContractID" = {?DocKey@}

Table.Name: Command
Table.Command: SELECT T0."ContractID", T0."ItemCode", T0."ItemName", T0."ManufSN", T0."InternalSN", T0."StartDate", T0."EndDate", T0."TermDate", T1."ItmsGrpNam" FROM "CTR1" T0 LEFT JOIN "OITB" T1 ON T0."ItemGroup" = T1."ItmsGrpCod" WHERE T0."ContractID" = {?DocKey@}

FormulaFieldDefinitions.FormulaFieldDefinition: switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Inklusiv helligdage', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Einschließlich Feiertage', True, 'Include Holidays' //Default English )

IF({Header.ResponseTime} > 1) THEN ( switch ( {Header.ResponseTimeUnit} = 'D', ToText({Header.ResponseTime},'#')+' '+{@Title_Days}, {Header.ResponseTimeUnit} = 'H', ToText({Header.ResponseTime},'#')+' '+{@Title_Hours}, TRUE, 'UNKNOWN RESPONSE TIME' ) ) ELSE ( switch ( {Header.ResponseTimeUnit} = 'D', ToText({Header.ResponseTime},'#')+' '+{@Title_Day}, {Header.ResponseTimeUnit} = 'H', ToText({Header.ResponseTime},'#')+' '+{@Title_Hour}, TRUE, 'UNKNOWN RESPONSE TIME' ) )

IF({Header.ResolutionTime} > 1) THEN ( switch ( {Header.ResolutionTimeUnit} = 'D', ToText({Header.ResolutionTime},'#')+' '+{@Title_Days}, {Header.ResolutionTimeUnit} = 'H', ToText({Header.ResolutionTime},'#')+' '+{@Title_Hours}, TRUE, 'UNKNOWN RESOLUTION TIME' ) ) ELSE ( switch ( {Header.ResolutionTimeUnit} = 'D', ToText({Header.ResolutionTime},'#')+' '+{@Title_Day}, {Header.ResolutionTimeUnit} = 'H', ToText({Header.ResolutionTime},'#')+' '+{@Title_Hour}, TRUE, 'UNKNOWN RESOLUTION TIME' ) )

switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Side: '+ ToText(PageNumber,'#') +' af '+Totext(TotalPageCount,'#'), {@X_Language} = 'NO', 'Side: '+ ToText(PageNumber,'#') +' av '+Totext(TotalPageCount,'#'), {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Seite: '+ ToText(PageNumber,'#') +' von '+Totext(TotalPageCount,'#'), {@X_Language} = 'ES', 'Página: '+ ToText(PageNumber,'#') +' de '+Totext(TotalPageCount,'#'), {@X_Language} = 'NL', 'Pagina: '+ ToText(PageNumber,'#') +' van '+Totext(TotalPageCount,'#'), {@X_Language} = 'FR', 'Page: '+ ToText(PageNumber,'#') +' de '+Totext(TotalPageCount,'#'), TRUE, 'Page: '+ ToText(PageNumber,'#') +' of '+Totext(TotalPageCount,'#') )
